case_title: THOMAS PAUL RODGERS VS. MARK Z KUMLER et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KUMLER, MARK Z THORNTON, ERIC HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-12-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER RE MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (GRANTED IN PART, DENIED IN PART)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MARK KUMLER AND ERIC THORNTON'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED AS TO THE CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT THAT RELIEF. THE MOTION IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CLAIM FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES. PLAINTIFF ADMITS THAT THE PARTIES DO NOT HAVE A CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP THAT WOULD SUPPORT THE CLAIM. ATTORNEY'S FEES ARE NOT RECOVERABLE UNDER CIVIL CODE 3334. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS MARK KUMLER and ERIC THORNTON'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied as to the claim for punitive damages. Plaintiff's allegations are sufficient to support that relief. The motion is granted without leave to amend as to the claim for attorney's fees. Plaintiff admits that the parties do not have a contractual relationship that would support the claim. Attorney's fees are not recoverable under Civil Code 3334. Order signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CURTIS SMOLAR, ESQ., FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP, 415.364.5540, FOR PLAINTIFF THOMAS RODGERS,
B. SCOTT LEVINE, ESQ., 510.763.2300, FOR DEFENDANTS MARK KUMLER AND ERIC THORNTON.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS MARK KUMLER AND ERIC THORNTON'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED OCTOBER 10, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
